subcodes.first_line: O thou who extolleth divine praise! The outstanding services of thy honoured self are accepted and cherished at the threshold of oneness, and thy labours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای الهی خدمات فائقه آنجناب در درگاه احدیت مقبول و محبوب و زحمات
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
